languages.text: "Я слышу биение твоего сердца. Ты — не наваждение ксеносов. Помоги мне, человек".
"I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."
languages.original_text: "Я слышу биение твоего сердца. Ты — не наваждение ксеносов. Помоги мне, человек".

traits.locale_text: "I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."
"I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."
"My eyes do not deceive me. I can hear your heartbeat. I can smell your skin. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."
"I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."
"I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."

languages.text: 「私の目は欺かれない。あなたの鼓動が聞こえる。あなたの皮膚の匂いがする。あなたは異種幻影ではない。助けてくれ、人間」
languages.original_text: "My eyes do not deceive me. I can hear your heartbeat. I can smell your skin. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."

traits.locale_text: 「私の目は欺かれない。あなたの鼓動が聞こえる。あなたの皮膚の匂いがする。あなたは異種幻影ではない。助けてくれ、人間。」

languages.text: «Puedo oír los latidos de tu corazón. No eres una ilusión xenos. Ayúdame, human{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: "I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."

traits.locale_text: «Puedo oír los latidos de tu corazón. No eres una ilusión xenos. Ayúdame, human{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: “我听得见你的心跳。你不是异形的幻象。帮我，凡人。”
languages.original_text: "I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."

traits.locale_text: “我听得见你的心跳。你不是异形的幻象。帮我，凡人。”

languages.text: "Ich kann Euren Herzschlag hören. Ihr seid keine Illusion der Xenos. Helft mir, Mensch."
languages.original_text: "I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."

traits.locale_text: "Ich kann Euren Herzschlag hören. Ihr seid keine Illusion der Xenos. Helft mir, Mensch."

languages.text: "Kalp atışını duyabiliyorum. Sen bir zeno illüzyonu değilsin. Yardım et bana insan."
languages.original_text: "I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."

traits.locale_text: "Kalp atışını duyabiliyorum. Sen bir zeno illüzyonu değilsin. Yardım et bana insan."

languages.text: « J'entends battre votre cœur. Vous n'êtes pas une illusion envoyée par ces maudits xénos. Aidez-moi, {mf|humain|humaine}. »
languages.original_text: "I can hear your heartbeat. You are not a xenos illusion. Help me, human."

traits.locale_text: « J'entends battre votre cœur. Vous n'êtes pas une illusion envoyée par ces maudits xénos. Aidez-moi, {mf|humain|humaine}. »
